## Experiment

Implement the first experiment in `studies/DD-002-information-design/brief.md`: enumerate deterministic partitions of a rational evidence fixture with `M=3`, `N=2`, and at most four evidence states.

## Guardrails

Precompute the partition count. Evaluate all pure and anonymous symmetric equilibria exactly; certify Blackwell comparability; report planner and selected-equilibrium discovery separately; retain a complete null result if no reversal exists.

## Completion test

An immutable run contains the frozen configuration, exact outputs, equilibrium correspondence, independent evaluator, runtime/termination record, and claim-status decision.
